scripts.build: npx esbuild node_modules/@softeria/ms-365-mcp-server/dist/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/bundle.js --external:keytar --external:@azure/identity --external:@azure/keyvault-secrets "--banner:js=import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" && cp node_modules/@softeria/ms-365-mcp-server/dist/endpoints.json dist/endpoints.json
